title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, BlueStone in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BlueStone:
BlueStone is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone!
